chunks.text: EECS Undergraduate Newsletter | November 22, 2024. This newsletter provides updates and announcements for undergraduate students in the Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences department at UC Berkeley. Key topics include academic deadlines, upcoming events, research opportunities, and department news relevant to undergraduate studies.

Important academic deadlines for the current semester are highlighted, including course registration periods, drop/add deadlines, and final exam schedules. Students are reminded to check their academic calendars regularly and consult with advisors to ensure they meet all requirements for their degree programs.

Upcoming events include guest lectures from industry professionals, workshops on technical skills, and social gatherings for networking. These events aim to enhance students' learning experiences and provide opportunities to connect with peers and professionals in the EECS field.

Research opportunities for undergraduates are announced, including positions in faculty-led projects, summer internships, and independent study options. Students interested in gaining hands-on experience are encouraged to apply early and discuss possibilities with professors.

Department news covers faculty achievements, new course offerings, and updates on facilities or resources. This section keeps students informed about changes and developments within the EECS department that may impact their academic journey.
